strategies.name: ROI Reframing
strategies.pattern: Acknowledge concern -> Shift focus to return on investment -> Ask confirming question
strategies.example_line: Totally fair. Most teams initially feel the same, but they usually recover the cost after closing just one additional client.
strategies.followup_question: If the tool helped you close one more deal, would pricing still feel expensive?

strategies.name: Value Reframe
strategies.pattern: Agree on current state -> Present alternative perspective highlighting underlying value -> Check for agreement
strategies.example_line: I understand your hesitation. Think of this not as an added expense, but as replacing three fragmented tools you're already paying for.
strategies.followup_question: How much time does your team currently spend juggling those different systems?

strategies.name: Social Proof
strategies.pattern: Validate objection -> Mention similar successful client -> Highlight their outcome
strategies.example_line: That's exactly what [Similar Company] asked. Once they deployed our system, they saw a 40% increase in productivity.
strategies.followup_question: Would a similar increase make an impact for your team?

strategies.name: Risk Reversal
strategies.pattern: Acknowledge risk -> Offer guarantee or opt-out -> Ask for low-friction next step
strategies.example_line: I wouldn't want you to take any risks. That's why we offer a 30-day out clause if we don't hit the agreed metrics.
strategies.followup_question: With the downside covered, are you open to testing the waters?

strategies.name: Pilot Offer
strategies.pattern: Suggest smaller commitment -> Define success metrics -> Propose timeline
strategies.example_line: Instead of a full rollout, let's start with a 3-user pilot for two weeks so you can see the data yourself.
strategies.followup_question: Would a quick pilot be easier to get approved natively?

strategies.name: Future Pacing
strategies.pattern: Paint scenario of future success -> Link to product feature -> Ask how that changes things
strategies.example_line: Imagine it's next quarter and your team is automatically capturing all call data without any manual entry.
strategies.followup_question: How much time would that free up for actual selling?

strategies.name: Authority Alignment
strategies.pattern: Respect current process -> Offer to help build business case -> Suggest joint meeting
strategies.example_line: Makes sense that your VP needs to sign off. Usually, it's helpful if we provide a quick 1-pager outlining the ROI specifically for them.
strategies.followup_question: Would it make sense for us to hop on a brief call with them to walk through it?

strategies.name: Competitor Positioning
strategies.pattern: Acknowledge competitor strength -> Pivot to your unique differentiator -> Relate to prospect's specific pain
strategies.example_line: [Competitor] is great for general marketing, but our platform is built from the ground up specifically for high-velocity sales teams.
strategies.followup_question: Is your primary goal general tracking, or optimizing every sales conversation?

strategies.name: Urgency Creation
strategies.pattern: Identify cost of delay -> Introduce time-sensitive benefit -> Ask for commitment
strategies.example_line: Every month you wait is another month of lost data. Plus, we're offering onboarding support for teams that sign this week.
strategies.followup_question: What's preventing us from getting started and capturing that value today?

strategies.name: Loss Aversion
strategies.pattern: Highlight negative consequence of inaction -> Contrast with potential gain -> Ask for perspective
strategies.example_line: Sticking with the current process means you're continuing to lose hours a week on manual entry, while your competitors are automating it.
strategies.followup_question: Is that a cost you are comfortable absorbing long-term?

strategies.name: Price Anchoring
strategies.pattern: State higher cost alternative -> Compare to your price -> End on value
strategies.example_line: Hiring a full-time sales ops person would cost over $80k a year. Our software gives you similar insights for a fraction of that.
strategies.followup_question: Does framing it against the cost of an FTE change how you look at the investment?

strategies.name: Stakeholder Alignment
strategies.pattern: Acknowledge multiple views -> Map out stakeholder needs -> Suggest unified approach
strategies.example_line: I know your IT team cares about security while you care about speed. We've got SOC2 compliance to make IT happy while keeping the interface fast for you.
strategies.followup_question: What specifically is IT going to need to see to feel comfortable?

strategies.name: Problem Agitation
strategies.pattern: Restate problem clearly -> Explore downstream impact -> Present solution
strategies.example_line: You mentioned deals are slipping through the cracks. That's not just lost revenue, that impacts team morale and quota attainment.
strategies.followup_question: How much longer can the team sustain that kind of leakage?

strategies.name: Outcome Visualization
strategies.pattern: Focus on ultimate goal -> Describe what success looks like -> Ask for confirmation
strategies.example_line: Imagine hitting your quarterly target a month early because your reps instantly know how to handle every objection.
strategies.followup_question: Is that the kind of impact you're looking to drive this year?
